hook: Drinking coffee right after waking might be holding back your performance.

script.hook: Drinking coffee right after waking might be holding back your performance.
beats: Cortisol levels peak shortly after waking, helping you feel alert.
If you drink coffee too soon, you might blunt this natural boost.
Waiting 90 minutes allows your body to clear adenosine, improving caffeine's effectiveness.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Show a clock with time passing to indicate waking up.
Visualize cortisol levels rising in the body.
Illustrate adenosine clearance with a graphic of a brain.
End with a person enjoying coffee after the 90-minute mark.
